cc:Work.dc:title: ClosedBox
cc:Work.dc:description:
Fully closed box
This box is more of a building block than a finished item. Use a vector graphics program (like Inkscape) to add holes or adjust the base plate.
See BasedBox for variant with a base.
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes ClosedBox --FingerJoint_style=rectangular --FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0 --FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0 --FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0 --FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0 --FingerJoint_finger=2.0 --FingerJoint_play=0.0 --FingerJoint_space=2.0 --FingerJoint_width=1.0 --x=55 --y=55 --h=55 --outside=0 --thickness=3.0 --burn=0 --format=svg --labels=0 --labels=1 --reference=100.0 --tabs=0.0 --qr_code=0 --inner_corners=loop --spacing=1 --debug=0 Command line short: boxes ClosedBox --x=55 --y=55 --h=55 --outside=0 --burn=0 --spacing=1 Url: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/ClosedBox?FingerJoint_style=rectangular&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&x=55&y=55&h=55&outside=0&thickness=3.0&burn=0&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=1&debug=0&language=fr&render=2 Url short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/ClosedBox?x=55&y=55&h=55&outside=0&burn=0&spacing=1 SettingsUrl: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/ClosedBox?FingerJoint_style=rectangular&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&x=55&y=55&h=55&outside=0&thickness=3.0&burn=0&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=1&debug=0&language=fr&render=2 SettingsUrl short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/ClosedBox?x=55&y=55&h=55&outside=0&burn=0&spacing=1
